tasks.subject: Task 1: Restyle LogActivity.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the old glassmorphism LogActivity UI with Craft Earth tiles, keeping all AI-parse logic intact.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/LogActivity.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Page uses `bg-parchment` background, no `bg-nature-gradient` or `particles`
- [ ] Category picker is a 2×3 grid of `.tile` / `.tile-forest` buttons
- [ ] Selected category renders a `.tile` with a forest header bar and craft-styled textarea
- [ ] AI result preview uses `.tile.tile-forest` (dark tile reveal)
- [ ] Action button uses `bg-forest text-parchment shadow-craft`
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0 with no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/LogActivity.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bg-parchment background, no bg-nature-gradient", "category picker uses .tile/.tile-forest", "AI result preview uses .tile.tile-forest", "action button uses bg-forest text-parchment shadow-craft", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Restyle Progress.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace old Progress UI with Craft Earth tiles; move streak to hero position; elevate achievements to dark tiles.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/Progress.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Page uses `bg-parchment` background
- [ ] Streak tile is the first content element, full-width `.tile.tile-forest` with large streak number
- [ ] Monthly goal shows big number + `[&>div]:bg-forest` progress bar (amber if over target)
- [ ] Weekly comparison bars use `forest-light` (under) / `#c17f4a` (over) fills
- [ ] Earned achievements: `.tile.tile-forest` dark card; unearned: `.tile.opacity-50` faded
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0 with no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/Progress.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bg-parchment background", "streak hero is first element as dark tile", "achievements grid earned=dark/unearned=faded", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Restyle ActivityBreakdown.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace gray Shadcn Cards in ActivityBreakdown with craft tiles so the component is visually consistent when embedded in the Dashboard.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/ActivityBreakdown.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No Shadcn Card, Badge, or Button components remain
- [ ] Date group headers use `.craft-label` style with `border-[#d8cfc0]` separator
- [ ] Each activity row is a `.tile.tile-hover` div
- [ ] "AI Parsed" badge is a craft-style span with `bg-forest text-forest-light`
- [ ] Empty state is a plain div with `text-bark`
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0 with no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/ActivityBreakdown.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no Shadcn Card/Badge/Button", "date headers use craft-label", "activity rows use .tile.tile-hover", "AI Parsed badge uses bg-forest text-forest-light", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Visual verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm all three restyled pages look correct in the browser.

**Files:** No code changes expected; any tweaks committed here.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run dev` starts without errors
- [ ] Dashboard ActivityBreakdown section matches craft aesthetic
- [ ] LogActivity page renders correctly
- [ ] Progress page streak hero is prominent, achievements dark/faded correctly
- [ ] No leftover glass/gradient-text/bg-nature-gradient artifacts

**Verify:** Visual inspection at `http://localhost:5200`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no visual regressions on Dashboard", "LogActivity craft tiles render correctly", "Progress streak hero prominent", "no old aesthetic artifacts"]}
```
